about.en: SafePal is the token of SafePal, a crypto wallet ecosystem that includes hardware wallets, software wallets, browser extensions, and trading integrations. SFP is used for discounts, rewards, governance, and access to ecosystem campaigns and services. The project focuses on self-custody and multi-chain wallet infrastructure.
about.es: SafePal es el token de SafePal, un ecosistema de wallets cripto que incluye hardware wallets, software wallets, extensiones de navegador e integraciones de trading. SFP se usa para descuentos, recompensas, gobernanza y acceso a campanas y servicios del ecosistema. El proyecto se centra en autocustodia e infraestructura wallet multi-chain.
about.ca: SafePal es el token de SafePal, un ecosistema de wallets cripto que inclou hardware wallets, software wallets, extensions de navegador i integracions de trading. SFP s'usa per a descomptes, recompenses, governanca i acces a campanyes i serveis de l'ecosistema. El projecte se centra en autocustodia i infraestructura wallet multi-chain.
